title: Prepare and present livestock for competition
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and present livestock for competition demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Follow instructions to prepare livestock for showing

pcs.text: Identify and prepare livestock for showing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare livestock for showing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare livestock for showing.

pcs.text: Monitor feed and water supplies and replenish as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor feed and water supplies and replenish as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor feed and water supplies and replenish as required.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain feed records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain feed records.

pcs.text: Monitor health and welfare status of livestock and report abnormalities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor health and welfare status of livestock and report abnormalities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor health and welfare status of livestock and report abnormalities.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and maintain facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and maintain facilities.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Follow instructions to prepare livestock for showing

elements.title: Handle and groom livestock prior to competition

pcs.text: Select, check and use appropriate handling and grooming equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use appropriate handling and grooming equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use appropriate handling and grooming equipment.

pcs.text: Condition livestock to human handling and train to the standard required for show handling and performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Condition livestock to human handling and train to the standard required for show handling and performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Condition livestock to human handling and train to the standard required for show handling and performance.

pcs.text: Groom livestock for showing to competition standard
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Groom livestock for showing to competition standard?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Groom livestock for showing to competition standard.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Handle and groom livestock prior to competition

elements.title: Present livestock

pcs.text: Check equipment to be used in showing for correct operation and prepare for presentation requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment to be used in showing for correct operation and prepare for presentation requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment to be used in showing for correct operation and prepare for presentation requirements.

pcs.text: Present livestock using handling techniques to exhibit livestock to best advantage according to competition requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present livestock using handling techniques to exhibit livestock to best advantage according to competition requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present livestock using handling techniques to exhibit livestock to best advantage according to competition requirements.

pcs.text: Comply with instructions and requests from competition officials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with instructions and requests from competition officials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with instructions and requests from competition officials.

pcs.text: Report and record relevant livestock information according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and record relevant livestock information according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and record relevant livestock information according to workplace requirements.
